title: Retain time tracking logs and connecting them to status changes
excerpt:

would keep it’s time tracking log between moving from …

posts.author: Alenm (Alen)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be helpful if the items that has a time tracker would keep it’s logs when moving across items. For example, we have 2 boards, Idea and Implementation, item
would keep it’s time tracking log between moving from Idea to Implementation to have a full picture of how long the process is. In addition to that, having status changes next to the time tracker log, so if it’s connected to “Done, Working On It, Stuck” it would say how long it was on any of the statuses, instead of going to activity log and calculate myself.
